name: IRC_JA_NOTIF_CONFIG
description: This table is used to store the job sharing action configuration based on candidate selection process action context (IRC_STEP_ACTION_USAGES_B.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID).

columns.Name: JA_NOTIF_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for the table. System generated.

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key IRC_STEP_ACTION_USAGES_B table. (Life cycle action context)

columns.Name: NOTIFY_RECRUITER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that captures if Notification is enable for Recruiter

columns.Name: NOTIFY_HIRING_MGR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that captures if Notification is enable for Hiring Manager

columns.Name: INT_CAND_NOTIF_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Email template that is to be used for Internal candidate automatic notifications. Foreign key IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B.DESCRIPTION_ID

columns.Name: EXT_CAND_NOTIF_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Email template that is to be used for External candidate automatic notifications. Foreign key IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B.DESCRIPTION_ID

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NOTIF_DELAY
columns.Comments: Stores the delay time in hours before sending notification to the candidate.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
